# Session Intelligence — integration data dictionary

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-session-intelligence-docs.mjs at 2026-05-16T17:35:47.814Z. Do not edit by hand; run `pnpm docs:generate`. -->

This document lists **signal fields**, **meanings**, and **where each can be pushed** (tag managers, Adobe, Optimizely, custom events, or the Worker collect path). Types and shapes follow `@si/shared` and `packages/sdk/src/siteSemantics/activationPayload.ts`.

## Source files

| Role | Path |
| --- | --- |
| Signal catalog (this doc’s rows) | [`packages/shared/src/integrationDocs/signal-catalog.json`](../packages/shared/src/integrationDocs/signal-catalog.json) |
| Activation envelope builder | [`packages/sdk/src/siteSemantics/activationPayload.ts`](../packages/sdk/src/siteSemantics/activationPayload.ts) |
| Shared types | [`packages/shared/src/index.ts`](../packages/shared/src/index.ts) |
| Collect payload | [`packages/sdk/src/batcher.ts`](../packages/sdk/src/batcher.ts) → `AnalyticsPayload.summary` |
| Worker ingest | [`worker/src/index.ts`](../worker/src/index.ts) |

## PersonalizationSignal (flat)

Returned by `SessionIntel.getPersonalizationSignal()` and mirrored under `getActivationPayload().si.personalization_signal`.

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| visitor_status | "anonymous" | Visitor is not identified; signals are session-scoped only. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal, si:activation |
| journey_stage | JourneyStage | discovery \| browsing \| comparison \| conversion — inferred from behavior and rules. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal, collect.summary |
| inferred_archetype | string \| null | Vertical-aware persona label (e.g. strategic_researcher, implementation_evaluator). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| inferred_need | string | Plain-language need from activation opportunity (not page redesign advice). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| top_concepts | { id, label, score }[] | Up to five strongest business-concept affinities (0–1 scores). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| intent_score | number | 0–100 intent heuristic from session signals. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal, collect.summary |
| urgency_score | number | 0–100 urgency heuristic. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal, collect.summary |
| engagement_score | number | 0–100 engagement heuristic. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal, collect.summary |
| conversion_readiness | number | 0–100 blend of CTA engagement, intent, and return visit (not a guarantee to convert). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| recommended_message_angle | string | Suggested narrative angle for a treatment (e.g. implementation support). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| recommended_offer_type | string | Suggested offer class (guide, checklist, soft demo, etc.). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| recommended_surface | string | Where to place the treatment (maps from NBA surface + opportunity). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| recommended_timing | string | When to surface the treatment (e.g. after scroll depth, second page). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| recommended_friction_level | "low" \| "medium" \| "high" | Suggested friction for the offer or CTA. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| confidence | number | 0–1 confidence on activation opportunity backing this signal. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| reason | string[] | Short bullet reasons (trimmed) supporting the signal. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |


## Activation payload envelope

Top-level object from `SessionIntel.getActivationPayload()`.

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| event | string | Event name for tag managers (default si_personalization_signal). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely.eventName |
| si | object | Nested envelope consumed by GTM, Adobe, Optimizely, or custom listeners. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely.tags |


**Note:** `si.nba` may be `null` when no recommendation is active. `si.personalization_signal` duplicates the **PersonalizationSignal** table above.

## Nested `si.site`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| si.site.domain | string | Current host from site context. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.site.type | SiteVertical | Inferred vertical slug (e.g. b2b_saas). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.site.type_label | string | Human-readable site type for CMO-facing tools. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.site.confidence | number | 0–1 site fingerprint confidence. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.site.business_context | string | Same as type_label today — high-level business read. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |


## Nested `si.page`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| si.page.kind | GenericPageKind | homepage, article_page, pricing_page, etc. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.page.confidence | number | 0–1 confidence in generic page kind. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.page.primary_promise | string \| null | Primary headline / promise (normalized spacing). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.page.schema_types | string[] | Schema.org / JSON-LD types detected on the page. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |


## Nested `si.session`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| si.session.id | string | Anonymous session id (sessionStorage-backed). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, collect.session_id |
| si.session.journey_stage | JourneyStage | Same as personalization_signal.journey_stage in envelope. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, collect.summary |
| si.session.intent_score | number | Mirrors profile scores inside si for tag mapping. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, collect.summary |
| si.session.urgency_score | number | Mirrors profile urgency. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, collect.summary |
| si.session.engagement_score | number | Mirrors profile engagement. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, collect.summary |
| si.session.conversion_readiness | number | Mirrors personalization signal readiness. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.session.return_visit | boolean | Whether this anonymous session looks like a return visit. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |


## Nested `si.concepts[]` (each item)

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| si.concepts[].id | string | Slug derived from concept label. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.concepts[].label | string | Human concept name (e.g. Quarterly planning). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.concepts[].score | number | Affinity score 0–1 for that concept. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |


## Nested `si.objective`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| si.objective.primary | string | Primary inferred conversion objective string. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.objective.secondary | string \| null | Secondary objective when present. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.objective.confidence | number | 0–1 confidence on conversion objective inference. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |


## Nested `si.nba` (when non-null)

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| si.nba.action | string | Next best action copy from rules engine. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.nba.surface | RecommendedSurface \| undefined | Suggested UI surface enum when present. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.nba.treatment_level | RecommendedTreatmentLevel \| undefined | observe \| recommend_only \| safe_personalization. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.nba.confidence | number | NBA confidence 0–1. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |


## Nested `si.activation` (ActivationOpportunity)

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| si.activation.status | "developing" \| "ready" \| "strong" | How mature the activation read is for this session. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| si.activation.confidence | number | 0–1 confidence for the opportunity block. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.visitor_read | string | Plain-language anonymous visitor read. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely, si:personalization-signal |
| si.activation.inferred_need | string | Primary inferred need for personalization. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.message_angle | string | Angle for messaging (parallel to recommended_message_angle). | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.offer_type | string | Suggested offer category. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.surface | string | Suggested surface string from opportunity engine. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.timing | string | When to activate. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.friction | "low" \| "medium" \| "high" | Suggested friction for the path. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.primary_path_label | string | Primary activation path label. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.secondary_path_label | string | Secondary path label. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.soft_path_label | string | Soft conversion path label. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.opportunity_note | string \| null | Optional CMO-facing note. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.evidence | string[] | Evidence strings for the opportunity. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |
| si.activation.reason | string[] | Reason strings backing the opportunity. | dataLayer, adobeDataLayer, optimizely |


## Worker `/collect` — `summary` JSON (D1 `summary_json`)

Only `payload.summary` is persisted as JSON on ingest (plus denormalized columns). Full `AnalyticsPayload` includes experiment/treatments/conversion flags on the parent object.

| Field | Type | Meaning | Where it can be pushed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| pages | number | Pages viewed in session. | Worker D1 summary_json, dashboard aggregates |
| vdp_views | number | Vehicle detail views (auto vertical demo). | Worker D1 summary_json |
| pricing_views | number | Pricing page views. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| finance_interactions | number | Finance UI interactions. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| compare_interactions | number | Compare interactions. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| cta_clicks | number | CTA clicks counted in session. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| max_scroll_depth | number | Max scroll depth observed. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| intent_score | number | Denormalized on row and inside summary_json. | Worker D1 columns + summary_json |
| urgency_score | number | Denormalized on row and inside summary_json. | Worker D1 columns + summary_json |
| engagement_score | number | Denormalized on row and inside summary_json. | Worker D1 columns + summary_json |
| journey_stage | JourneyStage | Stored in summary_json and journey_stage column. | Worker D1 |
| category_affinity | Record<string, number> | Category → score map from IAB-style signals. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| site_vertical | SiteVertical \| undefined | Inferred vertical when hosted tag fills it. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| page_kind | string \| undefined | Site context page kind string. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| inferred_site_type | string \| undefined | Composite site type from environment. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| inferred_generic_page | GenericPageKind \| undefined | Generic page archetype. | Worker D1 summary_json |
| personalization_ladder | 1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| undefined | Confidence ladder level for safe personalization. | Worker D1 summary_json |


## `window.SessionIntel` helpers

| API | Description | Typical destination |
| --- | --- | --- |
| getPersonalizationSignal() | Returns a clone of profile.personalization_signal. | In-page JS,Console demos |
| getActivationPayload() | Returns { event, si } envelope for tag managers. | In-page JS,GTM Custom JS,Console demos |
| pushToDataLayer() / pushPersonalizationSignalToDataLayer() | Pushes full envelope to window.dataLayer. | GTM dataLayer |
| pushToAdobeDataLayer() / pushPersonalizationSignalToAdobeDataLayer() | Pushes full envelope to window.adobeDataLayer. | Adobe AEP / Launch data layer |
| pushToOptimizely() / pushPersonalizationSignalToOptimizely() | Pushes Optimizely event with eventName + tags = payload.si. | Optimizely Web |
| pushPersonalizationSignalAll() | All three pushes plus si:personalization-signal and si:activation CustomEvents. | One-shot wiring for demos |
| subscribe(cb) | Stream SessionProfile updates when scores refresh. | SPA hooks,Live UI |


## Browser custom events

| Event | Description | Typical destination |
| --- | --- | --- |
| si:personalization-signal | detail = ActivationPayloadEnvelope; fires when signal meaningfully changes (and from pushPersonalizationSignalAll). | addEventListener in-site |
| si:activation | Same detail as si:personalization-signal for generic listeners. | addEventListener in-site |

## Activation mapping stubs (JSON)

Reference maps under `packages/shared/src/context-packs/activation-mappings/` (extend for Launch / AEP / vendor-specific flattening).

### adobe.json

```json
{
  "tool": "adobe",
  "target": "adobeDataLayer",
  "event_name": "si_session_intelligence_update",
  "fields": {
    "si.site.type": "site_type",
    "si.page.kind": "page_kind",
    "si.session.journey_stage": "journey_stage",
    "si.session.intent_score": "intent_score",
    "si.objective.primary": "primary_objective",
    "si.nba.action": "next_best_action"
  }
}
```

**Field map (suggested):**

| Source path | Target key | Note |
| --- | --- | --- |
| si.site.type | site_type | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si.page.kind | page_kind | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si.session.journey_stage | journey_stage | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si.session.intent_score | intent_score | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si.objective.primary | primary_objective | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si.nba.action | next_best_action | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |

### epsilon.json

```json
{
  "tool": "epsilon",
  "fields": {
    "si_intent_score": "intent_score",
    "si_engagement_score": "engagement_score",
    "si_journey_stage": "journey_stage",
    "si_primary_objective": "primary_objective",
    "si_recommended_surface": "recommended_surface",
    "si_top_concept": "top_concept"
  }
}
```

**Field map (suggested):**

| Source path | Target key | Note |
| --- | --- | --- |
| si_intent_score | intent_score | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si_engagement_score | engagement_score | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si_journey_stage | journey_stage | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si_primary_objective | primary_objective | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si_recommended_surface | recommended_surface | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |
| si_top_concept | top_concept | Suggested flat key for Adobe-style mappings. |

### generic-data-layer.json

```json
{
  "tool": "generic_data_layer",
  "target": "dataLayer",
  "event_name": "si_personalization_signal",
  "notes": "Push SessionIntel.getActivationPayload() as a single object; fields mirror the `si` envelope."
}
```

### optimizely.json

```json
{
  "tool": "optimizely",
  "target": "optimizely",
  "event_name": "si_session_intelligence_update",
  "notes": "Use SessionIntel.pushToOptimizely() or map `si` to Optimizely custom tags on the event payload."
}
```
